name: Harpy

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The hound has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn’t have the Incapacitated condition.

text:
# Harpy

*Medium Fiend, Lawful Evil*

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

**Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6).** Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 17 (5d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.
